achievements.title: Assault Course Ace
achievements.description: [Lara's Home] Finish the assault course in 1 minute 25 seconds or less
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: No Winston, I Don't Fancy Some Tea
achievements.description: [Lara's Home] Lock the butler in the freezer where he can't bother you
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: The Family Riches
achievements.description: [Lara's Home] Visit the treasure room of Croft Manor
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: The Fanciest of Swans
achievements.description: [Lara's Home] Do an handstand on the diving board and then swan dive into the pool, all to the sound of some classical music
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Locked From the Outside
achievements.description: [Lara's Home] Exit the mansion through the back door
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: The Great Wall
achievements.description: Complete the 1st level, The Great Wall
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Secrets of The Great Wall
achievements.description: Collect the three secrets of The Great Wall
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: NLNMAS in The Great Wall
achievements.description: Complete 'The Great Wall' without loading or using medipacks, and having found all secrets
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: A Swan in China
achievements.description: [The Great Wall] Swan dive into the pool on the side of the wall from the roof of one of the towers (no glitches)
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Dart Across the Pond
achievements.description: [The Great Wall] Make it through the dart traps without hanging from the crevice or taking damage
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: You Talkin' to Me?
achievements.description: [The Great Wall] Stand in front of a spike wall and call out its bluff
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Apex Predator
achievements.description: [The Great Wall] Defeat both T-Rexes without using medipacks or hiding out where they can't easily reach you
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Tomb Conservationinst
achievements.description: [The Great Wall] Complete the level without killing any wildlife
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Secrets of Venice
achievements.description: Collect the three secrets of Venice

achievements.title: NLNMAS in Venice
achievements.description: Complete 'Venice' without loading or using medipacks, and having found all secrets

achievements.description: [Venice] Preserve the cultural heritage of Venice by completing the level without destroying any gondolas
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Lara Croft Boat Racing
achievements.description: [Venice] Starting at the ramp, do 3 laps around the buildings on the left without letting go of the throttle or taking damage (map in comments)
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Did I Leave the Mines On?
achievements.description: [Venice] Start the final boat race having "forgotten" to clear the mines, but complete the level nonetheless

achievements.title: Making an Entrance
achievements.description: [Bartoli's Hideout] At the start, jump off the boat at maximum speed and land safely on the wooden dock

achievements.title: What's the Detonator For?
achievements.description: [Bartoli's Hideout] Complete the level without blowing up the bomb
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: See Through the Simulation
achievements.description: [Bartoli's Hideout] Throw a flare down the exit shaft and contemplate your existence

achievements.title: I Don't Want No Trouble
achievements.description: [Opera House] Creep on board the plane without killing anyone or using medipacks in the final storage room

achievements.description: [Temple of Xian] Make it through the spider cave without letting any spider touch you
